headline: U.S. companies should give Trump tariff refunds to workers as bonuses or raises: Greer
summary: The United States government could end up paying $165 billion of more in refunds for Trump's IEEPA tariffs that the Supreme Court ruled were illegal.

headline: Wall Street Roundup: War, Oil, Airlines, Energy, AI, Private Credit
summary: Oil price volatility, airlines lower, energy up. Banking stocks down; private credit concerns.

headline: FedEx, UPS up fuel fees, levy Middle East surcharges amid Iran war
summary: Parcel shippers should continue to expect price volatility and targeted surcharges as the conflict continues, an expert said.
